generated_oml:
instance BuildingInfrastructure : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical building infrastructure in the Architecture, Engineering, Construction, and Operations (AECO) domain, exemplified by a Living Lab case study, serving as the physical counterpart for the digital twin."
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, HumiditySensor, OccupancySensor, LightingController, HVACValve
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors that collect temperature data from physical building systems"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors that collect humidity data from physical building systems"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors that detect occupancy levels in building spaces"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurements from physical building sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HonoEnabler, DittoEnabler
]

instance HumidityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time humidity measurements from physical building sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HumidityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HonoEnabler, DittoEnabler
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data from physical building sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HonoEnabler, DittoEnabler
]

instance BuildingBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM models containing geometric, spatial, and functional building data for the physical building infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEEnabler
]

instance HonoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT data ingestion from sensors and actuators"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, EnergyOptimizationService, VisualizationService
]

instance DittoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management and state synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, EnergyOptimizationService, VisualizationService
]

instance UnrealEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for interactive 3D visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance MDEEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering for automated transformation of BIM models into runtime artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, EnergyOptimizationService
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building operational data"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy consumption optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionOptimizationInsight, HVACControlAction
]

instance VisualComfortService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visual comfort enhancement through lighting and shading adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortAdjustmentInsight, LightingControlAction
]

instance HealthEffectManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Management of non-visual health effects via environmental adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:provides HealthEffectManagementInsight, HVACAdjustmentAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization using Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Building simulation for scenario analysis and optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time operational status of building systems"
]

instance EnergyConsumptionOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive energy consumption analysis for optimization"
]

instance VisualComfortAdjustmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Adjustments to lighting and shading for optimal visual comfort"
]

instance HealthEffectManagementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights on environmental factors affecting occupant health"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulated outcomes for various building scenarios"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building systems and data"
]

instance HVACControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of HVAC system parameters"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LightingControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated control of lighting systems based on occupancy and light levels"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HVACAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated HVAC adjustments for health effect management"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LightingController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators that execute lighting control commands from the digital twin"
]

instance HVACValve : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators that control HVAC system valves based on digital twin commands"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by the digital twin (e.g., lighting adjustments, HVAC commands) transmitted through Ditto to actuators in the Building Control System (BCS), enabling bidirectional communication for operational adjustments."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with sensor data updates and control command execution, as specified by Eclipse Hono and Ditto for low-latency data exchange."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A central DT Framework integrating BIM, Hono, Ditto, and Unreal Engine components, with roles for Building Control Engineers (modeling), Facility Managers (monitoring), and DT Engineers (service extension), enabling modular, service-oriented operations."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers the entire building life cycle from design through construction to operation and refurbishment, with the digital twin primarily focused on the operational phase (as operated) using BIM models enriched with runtime data."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Measured using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to assess synchronization accuracy; semantic drift prevention through continuous synchronization techniques to maintain alignment between digital and physical models."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono (supporting MQTT, AMQP, HTTP protocols) for sensor data ingestion and Ditto for digital twin management, enabling bidirectional communication with standardized IoT and digital twin protocols."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems including BIM tools, sensor networks, AI platforms for reinforcement learning (e.g., BOREALIS), and stakeholder collaboration frameworks via standardized extension points."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to BIM standards (e.g., IFC), Eclipse Hono/Ditto IoT protocols (MQTT, AMQP), and standardized extension points for modular service integration to ensure interoperability across AECO domain."
]
